symbols.save_analysis: callable(cfg: shared.config.DatabaseConfig, analysis_date: str, result: dict) -> int
symbols.save_news_articles: callable(cfg: shared.config.DatabaseConfig, session_id: int, articles: list[dict]) -> int
symbols.save_top_picks: callable(cfg: shared.config.DatabaseConfig, session_id: int, analysis_date: str, picks: list[dict], source: str = 'rule') -> int
symbols.update_news_title_ko: callable(cfg: shared.config.DatabaseConfig, updates: list[tuple[int, str]]) -> int
symbols.update_news_translation: callable(cfg: shared.config.DatabaseConfig, updates: list[tuple[int, str, str]]) -> int
symbols.update_top_picks_ai_rerank: callable(cfg: shared.config.DatabaseConfig, analysis_date: str, ai_results: list[dict]) -> int
